reply.it: Nei linguaggi di programmazione, una chiusura è una astrazione che combina una funzione con le variabili libere presenti nell'ambiente in cui è definita secondo le regole di scope del linguaggio.
reply.en: In programming languages, a closure, also lexical closure or function closure, is a technique for implementing lexically scoped name binding in a language with first-class functions.

reply.it: In computer science, recursion is a method of solving a computational problem where the solution depends on solutions to smaller instances of the same problem.
reply.en: In computer science, recursion is a method of solving a computational problem where the solution depends on solutions to smaller instances of the same problem.

reply.it: Un array in informatica, indica una struttura dati complessa, statica e omogenea.
reply.en: Un array in informatica, indica una struttura dati complessa, statica e omogenea.

reply.it: A regular expression, sometimes referred to as a rational expression, is a sequence of characters that specifies a match pattern in text.
reply.en: A regular expression, sometimes referred to as a rational expression, is a sequence of characters that specifies a match pattern in text.

reply.it: In computer science, a sorting algorithm is an algorithm that puts elements of a list into an order. The most frequently used orders are numerical order and lexicographical order, and either ascending order or descending order.
reply.en: In computer science, a sorting algorithm is an algorithm that puts elements of a list into an order. The most frequently used orders are numerical order and lexicographical order, and either ascending order or descending order.

reply.it: In computer science, a graph is an abstract data type that is meant to implement the undirected graph and directed graph concepts from the field of graph theory within mathematics.
reply.en: In computer science, a graph is an abstract data type that is meant to implement the undirected graph and directed graph concepts from the field of graph theory within mathematics.

reply.it: La pila, in informatica, è un tipo di dato astratto che viene usato in diversi contesti per riferirsi a strutture dati, le cui modalità d'accesso ai dati in essa contenuti seguono una modalità LIFO, ovvero tale per cui i dati vengono letti in or…
reply.en: In computer science, a stack is an abstract data type that serves as a collection of elements with two main operations:Push, which adds an element to the collection, and Pop, which removes the most recently added element.

reply.it: In informatica, una lista concatenata è una struttura dati dinamica, tra quelle fondamentali usate nella programmazione. Consiste di una sequenza di nodi, ognuno contenente campi di dati arbitrari ed uno o due riferimenti ("link") che puntano al…
reply.en: In computer science, a linked list is a linear collection of data elements whose order is not given by their physical placement in memory. Instead, each element points to the next.

reply.it: REST is a software architectural style that was created to describe the design and guide the development of the architecture for the World Wide Web.
reply.en: REST is a software architectural style that was created to describe the design and guide the development of the architecture for the World Wide Web.

reply.it: An application programming interface (API) is a connection between computers or between computer programs. It is a type of software interface, offering a service to other pieces of software.
reply.en: An application programming interface (API) is a connection between computers or between computer programs. It is a type of software interface, offering a service to other pieces of software.

reply.it: Character encoding is a convention of using a numeric value to represent each character of a writing script. Not only can a character set include natural language symbols, but it can also include codes that have meanings or functions outside of …
reply.en: Character encoding is a convention of using a numeric value to represent each character of a writing script. Not only can a character set include natural language symbols, but it can also include codes that have meanings or functions outside of …

reply.it: WebAssembly (Wasm) defines a portable binary code format and a corresponding text format for executable programs and software interfaces for facilitating communication between such programs and their host environment.
reply.en: WebAssembly (Wasm) defines a portable binary code format and a corresponding text format for executable programs and software interfaces for facilitating communication between such programs and their host environment.

reply.it: ESP32 is a family of low-cost, energy-efficient microcontrollers that integrate both Wi-Fi and Bluetooth capabilities. These chips feature a variety of processing options, including the Tensilica Xtensa LX6 microprocessor available in both dual-…
reply.en: ESP32 is a family of low-cost, energy-efficient microcontrollers that integrate both Wi-Fi and Bluetooth capabilities. These chips feature a variety of processing options, including the Tensilica Xtensa LX6 microprocessor available in both dual-…

reply.it: Con open source, in informatica, si indica un software distribuito, generalmente in via gratuita, che concede lo studio, l'utilizzo, la modifica e la redistribuzione.
reply.en: Open-source software (OSS) is computer software that is released under a license in which the copyright holder grants users the rights to use, study, change, and distribute the software and its source code to anyone and for any purpose.
